name: Scrambled Eggs and Corn
recipeIngredient: 2 Scallions, including a little of the greens finely chopped
1 large Ear of corn, kernels removed
2 tablespoons Grated Muenster cheese =OR= Monterey Jack cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in an 8-inch pan and add scallions, cilantro, and corn. Cook for a minute or so.
2. Add a splash of water and continue cooking until the corn is tender. Season with salt.
3. Beat the eggs with a pinch of salt and a teaspoon of water. Pour them into the pan with the corn.
4. Scramble gently using a fork.
5. Add grated cheese at the end and stir in with a few strokes of the fork.
6. While cooking, warm tortillas in a dry pan.
7. Serve hot with eggs and salsa or extra cilantro, as desired.
